name: Tank War   Two Player
description: Its a game where you can play with a friend and brother forever with very fun and pleasant mechanics. There are 2 tanks in the game and each of these tanks is managed by a player, the rules are simple, whoever is defeated first wins the other.
instructions: Orange tank Moving A WS D Shooting E Blue Tank Moving Arrow Keys Shooting 0
tags: 2 Player, 2 Player Games, 2D, Arena, Fight, War
